select_when: A conjunctive chain has a binding constraint, so improving non-binding stages will not raise throughput.
There are competing action options and the team can name the current bottleneck with a measured limit before ranking fixes.
Local optimization is masking the true leverage point because many high-quality improvements still leave key outcomes flat.
One blocking dependency, queue, approval step, scarce specialist, or handoff is visibly capping the whole delivery plan.
avoid_when: The environment is too unstable for one fixed bottleneck frame because the limiting factor is moving every cycle.
The team is performing bottleneck theater and cannot name the governing metric, current cap, or evidence that the cap moved after intervention.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on measured bottlenecks, sequencing, and global throughput rather than on generic prioritization language.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor framework ornamentation because the raw source is already strong on binding constraints, explicit metrics, and anti-local-optimization discipline.
Did not add higher-order fields because this batch stays inside the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The typed fields compress a source that spans operational throughput, staffing limits, stakeholder queues, and communication simplification.

select_when.note: The raw strengths section is explicit on binding constraints, measured bottlenecks, local optimization failure, and sequencing around a single cap.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are directly supported by the source danger line on unstable environments and the anti-pattern on bottleneck theater without measurement.

input_type.note: The raw source activates on system throughput limited by one binding element, but the compact input label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The source produces bottleneck-first sequencing and intervention ranking; the output label compresses that into a typed artifact.

reasoning_types.note: Theory of constraints clearly uses systems and diagnostic reasoning, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
